title: SQL Mission 3: EXISTS Instead Of Join For Presence

initialState.content:
-- Mission 3 Guidelines
-- Return: c.customer_id, c.name
-- Use EXISTS with correlated subquery

SELECT
  c.customer_id,
  c.name
FROM customers c
WHERE EXISTS (
  -- TODO correlated subquery
)
ORDER BY c.customer_id;

rules: must_include:where exists (select 1 from orders o where o.customer_id = c.customer_id)
